channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Fire crews in Southern California quickly extinguish brush fires amid extreme fire weather
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Firefighters quickly extinguished several brush fires that erupted Monday in Southern California amid windy and dry conditions.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump pardons nearly all Jan. 6 rioters on first day of presidency
item.description: President Trump pardoned nearly all Jan. 6 defendants on Monday, making good on a long-standing campaign promise just hours into his second presidency.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, WGN 9

item.title: Senate confirms Marco Rubio as secretary of state, giving Trump the first member of his Cabinet
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Senate quickly confirmed Marco Rubio as secretary of state Monday, voting unanimously to give President Donald Trump the first member of his new Cabinet on Inauguration Day.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Chicago PD says it ‘will not assist’ with upcoming ICE deportations
item.description: The Chicago Police Department vowed Monday to not comply with or assist federal agencies like ICE when it comes to deporting illegal immigrants.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump signs executive order directing US withdrawal from the Paris climate agreement
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump signed an executive order Monday directing the United States to again withdraw from the landmark Paris climate agreement, dealing a blow to worldwide efforts to combat global warming and once again distancing the U.S. from its closest allies.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW DALY and SETH BORENSTEIN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump signs executive orders on federal workforce, free speech
item.description: President Trump signed multiple executive orders during his inauguration parade at Capital One Arena on Monday evening, throwing pens to supporters after a signing ceremony. The signings at a small desk set up on stage in the Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Elon Musk already has a White House email address
item.description: "It seems to confirm he's going to have an EEOB office," the source said, using the acronym for Eisenhower Executive Office Building.
item.dc:creator: Amie Parnes, NewsNation

item.title: Ramaswamy won't serve on Trump's DOGE as he mulls run for Ohio governor
item.description: Ramaswamy, who sought the Republican nomination for president in 2024, has signaled plans to run for governor of Ohio.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Symbol of unity? Inauguration news coverage illustrates differences that pull country apart
item.description: Presidential inaugurals frequently symbolize what binds Americans, a quadrennial celebration of a peaceful transition of power.
item.dc:creator: David Bauder, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: WATCH: Carrie Underwood sings 'America the Beautiful' a cappella after apparent tech issue at inauguration
item.description: An apparent technical issue didn't stop Carrie Underwood from delivering "America the Beautiful" during the second inauguration of President Trump on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: Acting FBI Director Paul Abbate retires just minutes before Trump takes office: report
item.description: Acting FBI Director Paul Abbate, who took the helm from Christopher Wray, resigned Monday around when President Trump took his oath of office.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump officials shut down CBP One app for migrants
item.description: The app shutdown is part of a series of moves by the incoming administration to crack down on the border.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, NewsNation

item.title: WATCH: Carrie Underwood sings 'America the Beautiful' a cappella after apparent tech issue at inauguration
item.description: An apparent technical issue didn't stop Carrie Underwood from delivering "America the Beautiful" during the second inauguration of President Trump on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Cardinal Dolan, Franklin Graham pray at Trump’s inauguration
item.description: “Mr. President, the last four years, there were times I’m sure you thought it was pretty dark. But look what God has done,” Rev. Franklin Graham said.
item.dc:creator: Susie Pinto, NewsNation

item.title: Longtime Planned Parenthood head Cecile Richards dies at 67
item.description: Cecile Richards, the former president of Planned Parenthood, died at the age of 67 on Monday after a battle with cancer.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Vento, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Revisiting Ruidoso: Residents remain optimistic after devastating fires, flooding
item.description: RUIDOSO, New Mexico (KTSM) -- More than half a year later, the Village of Ruidoso continues to seek normalcy after two major wildfires scorched the area in June 2024. Together, the South Fork and Salt fires burned nearly 25,000 acres of land in the Ruidoso area.
item.dc:creator: Tirza Ortiz, NewsNation

item.title: Businessman found liable for $120 million in damages at special needs trust company
item.description: A federal bankruptcy judge ordered Clearwater businessman, Leo Govoni, to be responsible for the missing $120 million.
item.dc:creator: Brittany Muller, NewsNation

item.title: Melania Trump hat: What people had to say about Inauguration Day fashion
item.description: Of all the things that people could be talking about on Inauguration Day, it didn't take long for people to latch onto the attire of Melania Trump, with one point of discussion taking the lead: her hat.
item.dc:creator: Brian Farrell, KRON4

item.title: Texas man gets 14-years after unknowingly selling drugs to DEA
item.description: DEA agents executed a search warrant and found nineteen firearms, more than $34,000 in cash and approximately 23 pounds of drugs.
item.dc:creator: Julianna Russ, NewsNation

item.title: Ohio's infant mortality crisis: New law enhances support for women and infants
item.description: “This legislation ensures every child – whether they live in rural areas, cities, or suburbs – has the resources they need to thrive,” Latyna Humphrey said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: Ava Boldizar, NewsNation

item.title: Biden commutes sentence of Native American activist Leonard Peltier
item.description: President Joe Biden on Monday commuted the life sentence of activist Leonard Peltier, who was controversially convicted of murdering two FBI agents, within the final hour of his presidency.
item.dc:creator: Zack Budryk, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump plans to rename Gulf of Mexico to 'Gulf of America,' reports say
item.description: Karoline Leavitt announced one of the day-one executive actions President-elect Trump will take is renaming the Gulf of Mexico to "Gulf of America," NBC announced.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: MLK Jr.'s daughter: 'Wonderful' Trump being inaugurated on day celebrating father
item.description: Bernice King, the daughter of late civil rights leader Martin Luther King Jr., says the simultaneous occurrence of MLK Day and Inauguration Day this year is an opportunity to reflect on her father's legacy.
item.dc:creator: Cheyanne M. Daniels, KRON4

item.title: WATCH: Biden, Harris welcome Trump & Vance back to White House
item.description: President Joe Biden and Kamala Harris both welcomed their successors to the White House Monday morning, hours before the presidential inauguration.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump to issue executive orders defining sexes, ending DEI practices in government
item.description: President-elect Trump intends to issue executive orders on his first day in office that will recognize only two sexes, male and female, and aim to end diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) practices in the federal government, according to incoming White House officials.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Heavy snow and frigid Arctic blast put 70 million across the US under winter storm warnings
item.description: Tens of millions of residents along the East Coast are bracing for several inches of snow Sunday followed by dangerously cold temperatures that will take hold in much of the country from the Northern Plains to the tip of Maine.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bills will face Chiefs in AFC title game; Eagles will host the Commanders in NFC championship game
item.description: Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills will take on Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs in the AFC championship game for their fourth playoff matchup in five years. Allen ran for two touchdowns and the Bills beat Lamar Jackson and the Baltimore Ravens 27-25 in a divisional game on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump to promise 'new era of national success' in inaugural address
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is set to promise a “new era of national success” in his inaugural address, according to The Wall Street Journal.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, Fox 5

item.title: Trump inauguration to kick off 100-day rush
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is set to be sworn in at the Capitol on Monday, solidifying his stunning return to the White House and kicking off what is expected to be a busy 100-day rush focused on a handful of hot-button issues.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, KRON4

item.title: WATCH LIVE: Trump signs executive orders, celebrates inauguration
item.description: On a frigid holiday Monday in Washington, D.C., Donald Trump took the oath of office for a second time to become the 47th president of the United States.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KRON4

item.title: Trump says he will ‘most likely’ give TikTok 90-day extension
item.description: (The Hill) — President-elect Trump told NBC News on Saturday that he is likely to give TikTok a 90-day extension while his incoming administration assesses the situation following the Supreme Court decision to uphold a federal ban.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, WGN 9

item.title: Eggs are about to get even more expensive, expert says. Here's how much
item.description: Eggs are nearly 40% more expensive now than they were a year ago, the Labor Department said this week. It's about to get even worse, one expert says.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, Fox 5

item.title: A$AP Rocky’s shooting trial is set to begin. Here’s what to know about the case
item.description: A$AP Rocky is at a crossroads. He could soar to new heights of celebrity in 2025, or be brought back to earth quickly by a trial starting Tuesday that could lead to his imprisonment for years.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DALTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kevin O'Leary says he's offering $20B cash for TikTok
item.description: Investor Kevin O’Leary, widely known as a star from “Shark Tank,” said he offered TikTok’s owners $20 billion in cash to buy the platform during a Friday appearance on Fox News’s “America’s Newsroom.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bribery, fraud charges dropped against former New York Lt. Governor
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Federal prosecutors on Friday dropped bribery and fraud charges against former New York Lt. Gov. Brian Benjamin, citing the death of a cooperating witness against the Democrat who the governor had once chosen to be her second-in-command. Judge J.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Sub-freezing temperatures, sunshine forecast for Trump inauguration
item.description: Sub-freezing temperatures and sunshine are forecast for President-elect Donald Trump’s inauguration Monday.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, Fox 5
